Hot Work.hazard: Fire / Explosion due to flammable materials
Hot Work.control: Remove combustibles, maintain fire watch, and keep inspected fire extinguishers nearby

Hot Work.hazard: Burn injuries from sparks, slag, or hot surfaces
Hot Work.control: Wear flame-resistant clothing, gloves, face shield, and proper PPE
Ensure adequate ventilation or local exhaust and use respiratory protection if required

Confined Space.control: Continuous gas monitoring and maintain oxygen within safe limits (19.5%–23.5%)

Confined Space.hazard: Exposure to toxic gases (H2S, CO, etc.)
Confined Space.control: Pre-entry gas testing, forced ventilation, and use of gas detectors
Isolate all material sources and apply lockout/tagout procedures

Working at Height.hazard: Fall from height due to unprotected edges
Working at Height.control: Use full body harness with 100% tie-off and install guardrails
Install toe boards, use tool lanyards, and barricade area below
Inspect platforms and ensure anti-slip surfaces

Scaffolding Work.control: Erect scaffold by certified scaffolders and follow approved design
Install guardrails, midrails, and ensure fall protection systems
Use toe boards, debris nets, and secure materials

Critical Lifting.hazard: Load drop due to rigging failure
Critical Lifting.control: Use certified lifting gear and inspect before use
Ensure stable ground, use outriggers, and level crane properly
Verify load weight and follow crane load chart strictly

Electrical Work.control: Isolate power supply and use insulated tools and PPE
Wear arc-rated PPE and maintain safe working distance
Ensure proper grounding, circuit protection, and cable management

Radiography Work.control: Use shielding, maintain safe distance, and minimize exposure time
Barricade area and display warning signage with flashing lights
Allow only certified radiographers to handle equipment

Excavation Work.control: Provide shoring, sloping, or trench boxes and inspect daily
Identify, locate, and mark all underground services before excavation
Barricade area and install warning signs and edge protection
Provide proper drainage or dewatering system
